security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:8787 https://api.airtable.com https://streaming.assemblyai.com wss://streaming.assemblyai.com; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; media-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'
